company.name: The Agent Toolkit
company.tagline: We don't hire people to do process work. We train humans to become AI Architects, then they build AI Employees that handle the rest.
company.subtitle: Click any card to explore the org. Click AI Employees to see who's really doing the work.

social-media-data-analyst.name: Social Media Data Analyst
social-media-data-analyst.description: Scrapes competitor and inspiration posts nightly. Transcribes audio with Whisper. OCRs on-screen text. Writes structured per-post reports. On-demand mode (paste URLs in Cowork) in build.

daily-competitor-brief-writer.name: Daily Competitor Brief Writer
daily-competitor-brief-writer.description: Reads yesterday's raw reports. Synthesizes a tactical daily brief with hooks, frameworks, CTAs, and actionable takeaways in the Framework Library format.

weekly-competitor-brief-writer.name: Weekly Competitor Brief Writer
weekly-competitor-brief-writer.description: Zooms out across seven days of briefs and reports. Produces a weekly content plan with hooks, frameworks, and CTAs pre-assigned to each proposed post.

hooks-specialist.name: Hooks Specialist
hooks-specialist.description: Scans new reel analyses, competitor briefs, and transcripts. Extracts high-performing hooks. Tags each by pattern, source, date, and why it works. Appends to the Hook Library and deduplicates. Runs scheduled after the Social Media Data Analyst, or on demand.

reel-structure-specialist.name: Reel Structure Specialist
reel-structure-specialist.description: Sibling to Hooks Specialist for what happens AFTER the hook. Scans new reel analyses, briefs, and transcripts for tension beats, resolution mechanics, pacing data, on-screen text patterns, CTA structures, and transition phrases. Appends to the Reel Structure Library. Runs scheduled after the Hooks Specialist, or on demand.

transcript-specialist.name: Transcript Specialist
transcript-specialist.description: Mines verbatim Amber soundbites from her transcripts (Cohort calls, bootcamps, Collective, business planning). Tags by topic and intent (hook material, tension framing, resolution principle, full POV, story arc, signature phrase, contrarian take). Appends to the Soundbite Library, which all current and future copywriters (Reel, Carousel, B-roll, Email) read as a shared grounding source.

reel-script-copywriter.name: Reel Script Copywriter
reel-script-copywriter.description: Generates reel scripts in Amber's voice. Multiple hook options pulled from the Hook Library. Beat-by-beat structure, thumbnail text, short and SEO captions. Enforces 5th-grade reading level and contrarian POV per the Style Spec. Two modes: on-demand single reel, or weekly batch from the Weekly Brief.

carousel-post-copywriter.name: Carousel Post Copywriter
carousel-post-copywriter.description: Generates carousel slide copy and captions from the Framework Library plus voice guide. Tuned for save-rate and share behavior, not surface likes.
